interpretation: Very small group with extremely high frequency, revenue, and product diversity.
business_action: Offer exclusive loyalty benefits, early access, and personalized account management.

interpretation: Rare customers with unusually large one-time bulk purchases.
business_action: Monitor separately as outliers; avoid letting them distort normal customer trends.

interpretation: Frequent and recent customers with strong monetary value.
business_action: Upsell, cross-sell, and provide loyalty rewards.

interpretation: Main customer base with moderate frequency and recent activity.
business_action: Encourage repeat purchases through targeted campaigns.

interpretation: Customers with only one purchase but relatively recent activity.
business_action: Send onboarding offers and second-purchase discounts.

interpretation: Inactive customers with low frequency and low monetary contribution.
business_action: Run win-back campaigns or reduce marketing spend if unresponsive.
